CREATE TABLE test_table (id integer, value varchar(100));
CREATE PROCEDURE wait_and_select (in _interval integer) { delay (_interval); SELECT * FROM test_table; };
CREATE PROCEDURE multi_delay (in _interval1 integer, in _interval2 integer) { delay (_interval1); delay (_interval2); };
CREATE TABLE another_table (id integer, reference_id integer);
CREATE PROCEDURE wait_and_join (in _interval integer) { delay (_interval); SELECT t1.value, t2.reference_id FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.reference_id; };
CREATE FUNCTION test_delay_ranges() RETURNS void AS $$ BEGIN delay (0); delay (2); END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE PROCEDURE nested_delay (in _interval integer) { IF _interval < 5 THEN delay (_interval); ELSE delay (5); END IF; };
